creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Unlikely. sysutils/fusefs-simple-mtpfs still requires the fix but I don't maintain it anymore. Assignee is the domain expert here, so may know more if something has improved on base system side.

How did this manage to time out given zero feedback from Assignee is beyond me.
